title: hieracium rigidum subsp. lineatum
intro: Hieracium rigidum subsp. lineatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hawkweed can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its effectiveness and safety for consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
